title: German-Style Potato Bowl
description: A hearty, comforting dish inspired by German cuisine, combining crispy potatoes with crunchy toppings.
instructions: 2. Toss the diced potatoes with olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl. Spread on a baking sheet.
3. Roast the potatoes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden.
4. While the potatoes are roasting, prepare the crunchy onions by slicing them thinly and separating into rings.
5. To assemble the bowls, place a portion of roasted potatoes in the bottom of each bowl.
6. Drizzle German mustard over the potatoes, then top with crunchy onions and chopped parsley.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
